metadata.title: Profile a Fellow
metadata.audience: Humanitarians AI Fellows learning to use the Brutalist pipeline

beats.narration_text: Profile a Fellow. Make invisible work visible. Liam, in for Bear.

props.command: How do I build a profile video about a Humanitarians AI Fellow using their article or bio as the source?
output: Source: article, bio, or Substack post

beats.narration_text: Left: the source article — grey, document icon, title line, author. Center: the EXTRACT arrow. Right: the structured profile card — name in terracotta, thesis one-liner, project chips, links row, credit card at the bottom. That's the template. Article in, profile out.

The credit card is required. Every profile video must credit the Fellow by name with their affiliation and a link to their work. This appears as a dedicated beat in the video — not a footnote. The credit card makes the fellow visible as the subject and author of their own research story.

props.title: credit card beat

beats.narration_text: The handoff beat in a profile video asks the viewer to engage with the Fellow's actual work. The prompt you read aloud should direct them to the Fellow's GitHub, paper, or LinkedIn — not to a generic Claude prompt. The profile's handoff is about the person, not the tool.

artifactLines: Profile handoff → the Fellow's actual work.
Link: their GitHub repo, paper, or LinkedIn post.
Not: a generic Claude prompt about their topic.
The profile's handoff is about the person, not the tool.
props.sparkLine: Handoff is to the person, not the prompt.

beats.narration_text: Make invisible work visible. Article in, profile out, credit card included, and published in Fellows Research.

artifactLines: Source: any article, bio, or Substack post about the Fellow.
Extract: their thesis one-liner, projects, and key result.
Credit card beat: name, institution, affiliation, links — required.
Handoff: points to the Fellow's actual work, not a generic prompt.

beats.narration_text: Here's the prompt — and this one's the series finale. I have an article about a Humanitarians AI Fellow. Build a claude-explainer profile video in the Liam voice: extract their thesis, show their key projects, include a credit card beat with their name and affiliation, and have the handoff point to their GitHub. Run that prompt with the Fellow's article attached, and you'll have a profile video in one sitting. That's the full series — twelve episodes, one pipeline, your research made visible.

props.command: I have an article about a Humanitarians AI Fellow. Build a claude-explainer profile: extract their thesis, show key projects, include a credit card beat with their name and affiliation, and have the handoff point to their GitHub.

beats.narration_text: Profile a Fellow. Episode twelve of twelve. The Using Brutalist series — complete.
